Free Plan

Everything included in the Free Plan
  • Session tracking with add/edit session flow
  • Session history with search, sorting, and folder views
  • Bankroll history and manual bankroll adjustments
  • Profile, settings, and contact screens

Premium Plan

All features you have access to
  • Session tracking with add/edit session flow
  • Session history with search, sorting, and folder views
  • Hand history browsing and hand replay
  • Add hand workflow
  • Analytics dashboard
  • Bankroll history and manual bankroll adjustments
  • Profile, settings, and contact screens
Premium unlocks
  • Add hands to sessions
  • Full analytics dashboard
  • Hand history search and replay tools
  • Premium-only analytics cards
Coming soon
  • AI hand analysis
  • More advanced hand tracking
  • Import poker data files
